name: Albaconazole
description: Albaconazole has been used in trials studying the basic science of Onychomycosis.

interactions.name: Pravastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Pravastatin.

interactions.name: Lovastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Lovastatin.

interactions.name: Cerivastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Cerivastatin.

interactions.name: Simvastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Simvastatin.

interactions.name: Fluvastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Fluvastatin.

interactions.name: Rosuvastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Rosuvastatin.

interactions.name: Pitavastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Pitavastatin.

interactions.name: Mevastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Mevastatin.

interactions.name: Ubidecarenone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Ubidecarenone.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Albaconazole.

interactions.name: Atorvastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Albaconazole is combined with Atorvastatin.
